final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the loan duration is longer, because it increases the probability of credit default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with a lower estimated credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the credit history is critical or includes other existing credits, because it allows classification into the good credit category, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a high risk of default.
